# The Birth of Tragedy

*[Nietzsche](../philosophers/nietzsche.md) · 1872*

Nietzsche's first book, it interprets Greek tragedy as the meeting of two forces, the Apollonian and the Dionysian, and argues that existence is justified only as an aesthetic phenomenon. It conceives the tragic ground of reality without yielding to resigned pessimism.
